title: Open Brain Source Contribution Metadata
description: Schema for metadata.json files in OB1 contributions (recipes, schemas, dashboards, integrations, skills, primitives, extensions).

description.description: Brief description of what this contribution does.

category.description: Which contribution directory this belongs to.

open_brain.description: Must be true. All contributions require an Open Brain setup.

services.description: External services needed (e.g., Gmail API, OpenRouter).

tools.description: Tools or runtimes needed (e.g., Node.js 18+, Python 3.10+).

requires_primitives.description: Slugs of primitives this contribution depends on (e.g., ["rls", "shared-mcp"]). Primarily used by extensions.

requires_skills.description: Slugs of canonical skills this contribution depends on (e.g., ["auto-capture"]). Use this when a contribution builds on reusable agent behavior from skills/.

learning_order.description: Position in the extension learning path (1-6). Extensions only.

tags.description: Tags for browsing by use case.

estimated_time.description: How long the setup takes (e.g., 15 minutes, 1 hour).

created.description: Date the contribution was first published (YYYY-MM-DD).
